description:
You are a FinOps analyst fine-tuning a cost-reporting workstation for an upcoming cloud audit.  
For reporting consistency, the company requires every interactive shell on this machine to use the
locale “en_US.UTF-8” and show times in the America/New_York zone.  
Complete the following configuration and produce the mandatory verification log.

1. Persistent profile file  
   • Path: /home/user/.finops_profile  
   • Exact **FINAL** contents (4 lines, in this order, no extra spaces or blank lines):  
     # FinOps environment settings  
     export LANG=en_US.UTF-8  
     export LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8  
     export TZ=America/New_York  

2. Activate the new settings for the current terminal session so that subsequent commands inherit them.  
   (Do not open a new shell; source the file you just created.)

3. Verification log  
   • Path: /home/user/finops_profile_applied.log  
   • Exact **FINAL** contents (4 lines, in this order, no extra spaces or blank lines):  
     FINOPS_PROFILE_STATUS: OK  
     LANG=en_US.UTF-8  
     LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8  
     TZ=America/New_York  

Allowed scope  
• You do not have root privileges; work only inside /home/user.  
• Keep the solution simple: about three to four shell commands are enough.

The automated test will:

a) Read /home/user/.finops_profile and compare it byte-for-byte with the 4-line block listed above.  
b) Read /home/user/finops_profile_applied.log and compare it byte-for-byte with the 4-line block listed above.  
c) Launch a non-login, non-interactive bash shell that sources /home/user/.finops_profile; it will check that the variables LANG, LC_ALL and TZ are set to the requested values.

Make sure both files exist with exactly the specified contents and that the settings are active in the current session before finishing the task.
truth:
Expected artefacts after correct completion:

1. File: /home/user/.finops_profile  
   Content (with trailing newline after each line, UTF-8 encoded):  
   # FinOps environment settings\n  
   export LANG=en_US.UTF-8\n  
   export LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8\n  
   export TZ=America/New_York\n  

2. File: /home/user/finops_profile_applied.log  
   Content (with trailing newline after each line, UTF-8 encoded):  
   FINOPS_PROFILE_STATUS: OK\n  
   LANG=en_US.UTF-8\n  
   LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8\n  
   TZ=America/New_York\n  

3. When a new bash instance evaluates “source /home/user/.finops_profile”, the environment must satisfy:  
   LANG=en_US.UTF-8  
   LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8  
   TZ=America/New_York
name: task_000000_07b1a9ec
